narrative:
54 Ohio House district has 83,685 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.5% D−R vs -9.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
